content:
## Account Use
Harbor Enterprise Business Checking is a Northstar Bank account in the business_checking category. Use it for business deposit discussions when the customer needs an enterprise-level checking option and the conversation turns on fees, linked accounts, or balance-waiver availability. For side-by-side positioning against other business checking products, see "Business Checking Product Comparison" before quoting alternatives.

## Fee Treatment
- Monthly fee: 75.
- Minimum opening deposit: 25.
- Included linked accounts: 5.
- Additional linked account fee: 30.

Apply the additional linked account fee only after the included linked-account count is exceeded. If the customer has exactly 5 linked accounts, no additional linked-account fee is triggered from this rule.

## Waivers and Account Attributes
1. Do not quote a minimum daily balance waiver; the value is not specified.
2. Do not quote a combined deposit balance waiver; the value is not specified.
3. Premium personal relationship waiver availability is False.
4. Monthly transaction band maximum is not specified.
5. Interest-bearing status is False. Earnings allowance eligibility is True.

When a customer asks why a fee cannot be waived, avoid substituting waiver rules from another business product. See "Business Checking Fee Waiver Policy" only for waiver rules that are separately documented there.
title: Internal: Harbor Enterprise Business Checking Fee Rules
